title: A Letter for Dalhurst
description: Tharin Ironbeard has asked you to deliver a sealed letter to his contact in Dalhurst, a man named Aldric Vane who runs a curiosities shop. The dwarf spoke with unusual gravity, hinting that this concerns 'matters that predate the Empire itself.' The wax seal bears a symbol you've never seen - an eye within a circle of stars, marking it as correspondence of some secret society. Tharin mentioned that Aldric collects ancient artifacts and forbidden knowledge - the sort of man who knows things others have forgotten. Whatever truth this letter contains, it seems you've stumbled into something larger than yourself.

objectives.description: Deliver the letter to Aldric Vane
